'''sadhoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nibble|nibble]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-dh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nibble|nibble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sadhoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sædheketh|sædheketh]] || [[word:sædhekej|sædhekej]] || [[word:sædhekesh|sædhekesh]] || [[word:sædheke|sædheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sadhodhokoth|sadhodhokoth]] || [[word:sadhodhokoj|sadhodhokoj]] || [[word:sadhodhokosh|sadhodhokosh]] || [[word:sadhodhoko|sadhodhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sadhokoth|sadhokoth]] || [[word:sadhokoj|sadhokoj]] || [[word:sadhokosh|sadhokosh]] || [[word:sadhoko|sadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadhofkoth|sadhofkoth]] || [[word:sadhofkoj|sadhofkoj]] || [[word:sadhofkosh|sadhofkosh]] || [[word:sadhofkof|sadhofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sadhokotho|sadhokotho]] || [[word:sadhokojo|sadhokojo]] || [[word:sadhokosho|sadhokosho]] || [[word:sadhokoko|sadhokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sadhokoth|sadhokoth]] || [[word:sadhokoj|sadhokoj]] || [[word:sadhokosh|sadhokosh]] || [[word:sadhoko|sadhoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sadhokothol|sadhokothol]] || [[word:sadhokojol|sadhokojol]] || [[word:sadhokoshol|sadhokoshol]] || [[word:sadhokokol|sadhokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sadhokothotho|sadhokothotho]] || [[word:sadhokojojo|sadhokojojo]] || [[word:sadhokoshosho|sadhokoshosho]] || [[word:sadhokoko|sadhokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sadhokothon|sadhokothon]] || [[word:sadhokojon|sadhokojon]] || [[word:sadhokoshon|sadhokoshon]] || [[word:sadhokokon|sadhokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sadhokothoro|sadhokothoro]] || [[word:sadhokojoro|sadhokojoro]] || [[word:sadhokoshoro|sadhokoshoro]] || [[word:sadhokokoro|sadhokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
